title: OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC - 211info
text: TUALATIN HIGH SCHOOL SBHC OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A statewide network of certified health care providers that ensure access to a variety of reproductive health services. Services include annual gynecological exams, pap tests, breast exams, STI screening and treatment. Offers pregnancy testing, birth control counseling, contraception, emergency contraception and abortions. 22300 SW Boones Ferry Road Room 26a Tualatin, OR 97062 Eligibility: Individuals with an income below 250% Federal Poverty Level Hours: Monday-Friday 8:00am-noon and 12:30pm-4:30pm (503) 941-3180 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 941-3180 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Low cost or free based on service, insurance will be billed if applicable. Sliding scale fees available. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, and other intrepretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Students within the Tualatin-Tigard School District TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Trimet bus line 96 Services: Abortion Referrals Birth Control Counseling Breast Examinations Contraception Emergency Contraception General Sexuality/Reproductive Health Education Pap Tests Pregnancy Testing Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. TUALATIN HIGH SCHOOL SBHC
